title: Our Evolving View of Childhood The Evolution of Childhood Relationships, Emotion, Mind by Melvin Konner Harvard University Press, Cambridge, MA, 2010. 959 pp. $39.95, £29.95, €36. ISBN 9780674045668.
abstract: Combining findings on evolution, maturation, socialization, and culture, Konner offers a broad-based explanation of how biology underlies "normally developing social behavior."
